# Archive test fixtures

- `sevenzip-t1.7z` is `testdata/t1.7z` from
  [bodgit/sevenzip](https://github.com/bodgit/sevenzip), used under its BSD
  3-Clause license in `LICENSE-sevenzip.txt`.
- `rar5-subdirs.rar` and `rar5-symlink-unix.rar` are from
  [markokr/rarfile](https://github.com/markokr/rarfile), used under its ISC
  license in `LICENSE-rarfile.txt`.

The fixtures exercise real bundled readers and must never be executed.
